title: Build a Job Application Form
description: A job application form that uses multiple CSS pseudo-classes for real-time visual feedback. Input validation states (:valid, :invalid) change border colors to green or red, :focus highlights active fields in blue, :checked styles selected radio buttons with a border, background, and box-shadow, and :first-of-type rounds the first input's corners.
objectives: Use :focus to highlight the active input field
Use :invalid and :valid to give real-time border color feedback
Use :checked on radio buttons to change border, background, and box-shadow
Use :checked + label to change sibling label color when selected
Use :first-of-type to style the first input differently

files.name: index.html
files.content:
Job Application Form
